creator: coryking@mozimedia.com
text:
Hey Roam,

I figured as much when I read over the change log.  I probably did the easy
part bumping up the version number and changing the packing list.  I never
tested what got compiled (yet, this is a dependency in our project).  Your
patches patched, but who knows if they still apply or worse, crash the
program :-)

Cheers!!
